articles.author: Justina Lee
articles.title: Asia-Pacific markets open lower on renewed Middle East tensions - CNBC
articles.description: Asia-Pacific markets open lower amid renewed tensions between Iran and the U.S. and worries that the conflict may keep inflation elevated.
